title: Promote normalized driver/adaptor checklist into canonical specs
acceptance: Checklist rows are canonical spec authority and not only public_audit_output evidence

title: Create target checklist row tracker
acceptance: Every D/A checklist row has spec implementation test and closure status columns

title: Override obsolete optional baseline wording
acceptance: Checklist-required rows cannot be treated as optional baseline

title: Fail-close PEER and ident authentication drift
acceptance: PEER authentication without verified OS peer credential evidence is denied and tested

title: Create implementation-ahead classification register
acceptance: Every high/medium audit item is accepted_and_specified guarded_until_specified or removed_or_refused

title: Add row-status YAML schema and zero-grey gate inputs
acceptance: Gate rejects missing checklist row evidence and implementation-ahead drift

title: Create target evidence manifest
acceptance: Every checklist row has owner labels evidence fields route requirement and closure rule

title: Create agent write-scope matrix
acceptance: Every implementation agent has disjoint write scope forbidden paths heartbeat file and acceptance rule

title: Create hardening and AI-budget controls
acceptance: No-placeholder security MGA wire driver route and resume controls are documented

title: Create phase closure models
acceptance: Spec wire security datatype metadata driver evidence and full-route closure requirements are explicit and P0 validation evidence is recorded

title: Driver core contract closure
acceptance: Driver discovery config auth transaction metadata diagnostics streaming pooling conformance and release evidence specs cite registry rows

title: Native wire session management authority
acceptance: STARTUP connect kv ReadyForQuery ParameterStatus ServerInfo Ping Pong ResetSession Reauth Cancel Disconnect state notifications timeouts keepalive and trace context are byte specified

title: Connect key registry
acceptance: Every DSN connect-time key required by D2 D5 D22 D24 has type default redaction and server propagation rules

title: Auth method and provider registry reconciliation
acceptance: All code-visible and driver-required auth methods/providers have method ids provider ids support state verifier boundary and fail-closed status

title: Parameter result and type wire authority
acceptance: ParameterDataPacket ParameterDescription RowDescription metadata bitmap and CanonicalTypeId wire byte layouts are authoritative

title: Execution envelope authority
acceptance: MultiResultEnvelope generated keys OUT INOUT batch pipeline array-bind bulk reject LOB locator cursor and copy behavior are specified

title: Cancel diagnostics and observability authority
acceptance: Cancel SQLSTATE 57014 timeout/network distinctions parameter redaction map and W3C trace context are specified

title: SBLR API operation matrix back-port
acceptance: All implemented SBLR_API_OPERATION_MATRIX operation ids have spec authority and noncluster/cluster scope status

title: Protocol version and feature negotiation skew matrix
acceptance: Old/new client/server version feature-bit extension downgrade and refusal behavior are specified and testable

title: Deterministic refusal and temporary unsupported matrix
acceptance: Unsupported guarded conditional and not-applicable rows have exact diagnostics SQLSTATE finality and route behavior

title: Manager listener implementation reconciliation
acceptance: Code-visible MCP/SBWP/session behavior matches specs or is guarded/refused

title: Native wire implementation reconciliation
acceptance: Reset reauth cancel ping parameter/result multi-result batch array-bind LOB notification trace and charset/timezone paths match specs

title: Security implementation reconciliation
acceptance: Auth providers methods PEER OS evidence token rotation channel binding MFA redaction and policy match specs and fail closed otherwise

title: Datatype metadata implementation reconciliation
acceptance: Wire type encodings row/parameter metadata flags and catalog metadata satisfy D8 D9 D13 D22

title: MGA transaction driver behavior reconciliation
acceptance: Autocommit reset reconnect cancel pooling savepoint XA limbo dormant reattach and no hidden retry behavior match MGA specs

title: Wire auth driver fuzz and fault injection matrix
acceptance: Malformed frames oversized payloads duplicate keys auth replay TLS downgrade and state races fail closed without MGA drift

title: Driver lane row-status manifests
acceptance: Every driver lane has machine-readable D/A row status evidence and N/A citations

title: Adapter row-status manifests
acceptance: Every adapter has machine-readable A row status evidence and pass/fail route

title: Driver/adaptor/tool CTest integration
acceptance: Ctest fails if required checklist row is missing stale undocumented or unproven

title: Packaging distribution and reproducibility evidence
acceptance: Every driver adapter and tool lane proves package metadata signing SBOM install smoke and build-artifact isolation

title: Server verification packet execution
acceptance: Every claimed lane executes live server verification packet through declared route and auth policy

title: Full-route regression and benchmark evidence
acceptance: Client/driver/tool to SBWP/TLS or IPC to listener/parser/server/engine route passes and benchmark exercises real route

title: Implementation-ahead zero-grey gate
acceptance: Gate fails when implementation-visible driver behavior lacks spec authority

title: Performance budget and benchmark threshold gate
acceptance: Real-route benchmark thresholds are defined and regressions fail CTest

title: Documentation and sample application verification gate
acceptance: Driver DSN auth TLS diagnostics and adapter sample apps are executable and cited by release evidence

title: Reference-driver compatibility route gate
acceptance: Reference compatibility lanes run through admitted driver/wire/listener/parser/server/engine route not parser-only shortcuts

title: Inventory and release declaration sync
acceptance: Inventory and public registry reflect driver/server spec implementation closure honestly

title: Final audit and closure report
acceptance: All DSR acceptance gates pass and remaining public driver gaps are explicitly listed if any

title: Machine-readable release declaration generator
acceptance: Release declaration lists supported fail_closed conditional_n/a and not_implemented for every checklist row and lane
